final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [3:0] parameterIn,
    output reg [7:0] outputSignal
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(rst) begin
        outputSignal <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
        outputSignal <= {4'b0, parameterIn};
    end
end

endmodule
